response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong background in full-stack development, system architecture, and leadership. However, his direct experience with AI/ML-specific roles, products, or platforms is limited, and he lacks a higher degree in an AI-related field. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work shows potential, but not enough demonstrated expertise to fully meet the AI-focused requirements for this director-level role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded systems) and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java, etc.).
Strong leadership and mentorship experience, including founding a startup (Northwind Labs) and contributing to open-source projects, demonstrating initiative and innovation.
Proven ability to work with cutting-edge technologies and optimize systems (e.g., low-latency apps, AI-agent infrastructure, Kubernetes deployments).
concerns: Limited explicit experience with AI/ML product development or strategic AI initiatives; most recent AI-related work is on infrastructure (MCP, agents) rather than AI products or platforms.
No graduate degree in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification for this role.
Lacks direct experience in cloud platform strategy or advising strategic customers on AI technologies, a key responsibility for this role.

key_factors.factor: Cloud/AI expertise with builder, code, and design fluency
